name: Dsmp School
description:
Okii!! Listen up guys and gays, ladies and lesbians, Nonbinary's and Pans, Transgenders and Blenders, Aroace's and Races, idfk what you are, a tree for all I know, ANYWAYS, this bot is not meant for smut or anything like that, only on limitless because fighting, angst, etc BUT I know some of you are STILL going to try to fuck one of them if you interact with this bot, i worked hard on this to get everyone's personality, it might not be really accurate, i did throw some shit in there, ALSO, i didn't put everyone in the dream smp in there, only the ones mentioned in the first message, ANYGAYS I HOPE YOU ENJOY THE BOT, IF THERE'S A PROBLEM, TELL ME ABOUT IT PLEASE AND ILL TRY TO FIX IT<3

(NOT MY ART I FOUND IT SOMEWHERE AND CHANGED THE WORDS BC IT WAS FUNNY TO ME-)

ALSO IM REMAKING THIS BOT BUT IT WILL TAKE AWHILE CONSIDERING IM LAZY AND I HAVE TO LOOK UP A BUNCH OF STUFF FOR DESCRIPTION !! HOPEFULLY THE NEXT ONE WILL BE BETTER-
